The sustainer of life, Jupiter, is stationed in Leo, the house of the Sun.
The Sun is in Sagittarius with Ketu in the 2nd house and with Venus' in the
12th to him. This indicates good fortune and fame for the father.
Mercury is in the forest (Sagittarius) in this horoscope. Because
of the transposed positions of Venus and Mars, it becomes equivalent to
Mars being in the 12h house from Mercury. When Mercury moves
forward into Saturn's house, he meets Ketu and much farther Mars and
Saturn in Taurus. This indicates that the native will have a break in
education when Jupiter reaches Aries in his second round of transit,
which will be around the native's age of21 . Then the burden of continuing
the business of the family will fall on the native's shoulders. But, this
will create a situation as bad as serving Somebody else. The native's broth
